name: Nzoia River Flood Bunding Phase 3
blocking_factor: Budget shortfall and contractor defaults in phases 1 and 2
notes: Phases 1 and 2 built 47km of bunds but excluded Sigulu Island and eastern sectors. Phase 3 design complete since 2015. Procurement stalled.

name: Budalangi Permanent Resettlement Programme
blocking_factor: Community attachment to fertile floodplain land and political will
notes: Resettlement site at Mundika cleared. Houses built but most residents return to floodplain post-season. Attachment to agricultural land is structural — resettlement without livelihood replacement fails.

name: Nzoia Early Warning Gauge Network
notes: 12 gauges operational. SMS alerts reach sub-county administrators. Sigulu Island communities not receiving alerts directly. Radio broadcast not consistent.

name: Budalangi-Bumala Drainage Improvement
notes: Feasibility study done 2020. No procurement commenced. County Engineer position vacant 2022-2024.

name: Flood-Resilient Seed and Crop Programme
blocking_factor: Adoption barriers — flood-tolerant varieties yield less in non-flood years
notes: Fast-maturing flood-tolerant maize varieties distributed. Adoption ~40% of target farmers. Economic rationality of planting higher-yield varieties in non-flood years is understood by farmers.

name: Sigulu Island Emergency Evacuation Plan
blocking_factor: Boat capacity and funding for maintenance
notes: Evacuation plan operational. 4 boats pre-positioned. Two boats non-functional in 2023 floods due to maintenance backlog. Island population grew 30% since plan was designed.

name: Budalangi Flood Risk Mapping Update
notes: Updated 25m resolution flood risk map published 2023. Integrated into county development plan. Not yet used for planning approvals.

name: Cross-Border Nzoia Basin Coordination (Kenya-Uganda)
notes: Uganda's Nzoia upstream management directly affects Kenya flood timing. MOU drafted 2018. Not signed. Upstream dam releases continue without downstream notification.
